title: KosDB v3.4.0 - Rework and Stabilize
instructions: Reconstruct and stabilize KosDB v3.4.0 implementation. The commands.py file is severely corrupted with duplicated/overlapping fragments from multiple feature additions. First reconstruct a syntactically valid commands.py, then verify and fix related v3.4.0 modules (triggers, procedures, partitioning, advanced indexes, materialized views, FDW, events).

1783775955.8655007.instruction: Determine the extent of corruption in commands.py and identify the last clean version from git history or other files. Use git log, git show, and file size comparisons. Report the commit hash and line count of the clean baseline.

log.text: Started diagnosing commands.py corruption. File is 1,495,106 bytes / 38,080 lines. Python compile reports IndentationError at line 131. File contains duplicated/overlapping fragments from multiple v3.4.0 feature injections.
Identified clean v3.3.0 baseline at c59b686 (26,936 chars / 742 lines). v3.4.0 commit e25db99 corrupted commands.py to 1.4MB / 38,080 lines with duplicated overlapping fragments.

1783775955.865772.instruction: Rebuild commands.py by combining the last clean baseline with the new v3.4.0 handlers (triggers, procedures, partitioning, advanced indexes, materialized views, FDW, events). Avoid duplicated fragments. Ensure the class structure is consistent and all manager imports/initializations are correct.

1783775955.8667953.instruction: Run python3 -m py_compile commands.py and fix any remaining syntax or indentation errors. Also run any existing unit tests that exercise commands.py.
